fields.title: DRY: Extract shared path discovery (findNearestProjectPiDir, settings paths, EXTENSION_AGENTS_DIR)
fields.description: findNearestProjectPiDir is duplicated in parser.ts and agent-registry.ts. Settings path resolution (~/.pi/agent/settings.json, project .pi/settings.json) is duplicated across sandbox/config.ts, agent-registry.ts, and prompt/modes.ts. EXTENSION_AGENTS_DIR is duplicated in parser.ts and agent-registry.ts.
fields.close_reason: Extracted shared discovery module (shared/discovery.ts): EXTENSION_AGENTS_DIR, EXTENSION_ROOT, getUserSettingsPath, getUserAgentsDir, getProjectSettingsPath, findNearestProjectPiDir. Removed duplicates from parser.ts, agent-registry.ts, prompt/modes.ts, sandbox/config.ts.
